content.en:
The Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor was very arrogant, and he completely ignored the flattery of the other Heavenly Ancestors.

Although the other Heavenly Ancestors greeted each other, they didn't dare to approach the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, otherwise they would anger the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor, and the other party might shoot directly.

An ancient-level genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realms, who can withstand it present?

Soon.

Here comes another heavyweight.

This is a woman, and she is also a cultivator, and her appearance and temperament are far superior to other female Blood Transformation Realm cultivators.

And her cultivation was also very terrifying, reaching the level of nine blood transformation realms.

For the arrival of this person, many Blood Transformation Realm cultivators were also extremely respectful.

"I've seen Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor!"

"I've seen Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor!"

"I've seen Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor!"

Compared to the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, these Blood Transformation Realms are truly respectful to the Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor, but they are only afraid of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

"Who is this Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor?"

Ye Tian asked Hayes Heavenly Ancestor.

"Qing Yao Heavenly Ancestor is one of the deputy palace masters of the Ice and Snow Palace, another top overlord-level force in the Ancient Territorial Sea, a boundary-breaking genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, in terms of strength, it is no less than the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and it may even be a little stronger. Hayes Heavenly Ancestor introduced.

A boundary-breaking genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, such strength is indeed terrifying!

If such a boundary-breaking genius becomes an ancient-level genius, the strength is really terrifying!

However, it was too difficult for the Nine Blood Transformation Realm to become an ancient-level genius.

The higher the cultivation, the lower the chance of becoming an primeval-level genius, and once the cultivation of the primeval technique fails, the impact on the body will be greater.

Therefore, if you want an ancient-level genius, you must practice the primeval technique as soon as possible.

With the passage of time, a big man dojo.

Of course, there are also strong people on the side of the Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Rumble!!!

A golden dragon came from a distant area, and the terrifying aura on its body caused many Eight Blood Transformation Realm and Nine Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses to change slightly.

"This old guy is here!" Hayes Tianzu frowned.

Often introduced by Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, Ye Tian knew the origin of this golden dragon.

The patriarch of the primeval golden dragon clan, Ao Heng, is an existence that has survived since the primeval times, not only has he cultivated to reach the ninth blood transformation realm, but he is also an primeval-level genius.

It can be said that Ao Heng's strength is an existence that all the blood transformation realms present cannot contend with.

At this time, even the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor showed a solemn expression.

He dared to ignore other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and even dared to kill other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors at will, but he didn't dare to offend this Ao Heng.

"Nine Ancient Geniuses of the Blood Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian also gasped, such existences appeared.

He originally thought that his strength was very strong, and he could be called invincible in the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, but it was only compared with the ordinary Blood Transformation Realm, and there were still many Blood Transformation Realms that were more powerful than him.

Of course.

The primeval golden tablet was born, but it didn't depend on cultivation, whether he could break into the inner domain, and whether he could defeat an ancient-level genius of the same level.

When Ao Heng arrived, the other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors retreated one after another, and even existences such as Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor and Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor gave way.

After all, they can't afford to offend Ao Heng.

Suddenly.

A voice came.

"Ao Heng, you old guy is here too, I remember you didn't come last time!"

As soon as he finished speaking, a young man with a sword appeared here.

Seeing this young man, Ao Heng snorted coldly: "Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor, you can come, why can't I come?" The last time I didn't come, it was because I went to that place, so I didn't catch up. "

"Ao Heng, how many assessments have you been able to pass the Inner Domain this time?" asked the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor with a smile.

"My goal is three!" Ao Heng said.

"My goals are five!" said the Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor with a smile.

Ao Heng didn't speak, because he knew that the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor had this strength.

"Oh my God, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sword is here!"

"This is the Lord of the Stygian Sword Mountain, although the Stygian Sword Mountain is not a top overlord-level force, but the Lord of the Stygian Sword Mountain, the Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor, is an existence that the top overlord-level forces dare not offend!"

"I've only heard of the fame of the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor, but I've never seen this existence, and this time I finally saw it!"

"It is rumored that the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor has killed an Ancient Rank Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, I don't know if this news is true or false?"

"It's true, at the end of the ancient era after the primeval era of the territorial sea realm, the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor and the Blood Cave Heavenly Ancestor fought, both sides were nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level geniuses, after countless years of fighting, the Blood Cave Heavenly Ancestor was killed by the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor, I was fortunate to watch that battle!"

"That era is too old, I don't see it!"

......

"Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor!" Ye Tian found that he had too little knowledge, and many ancient beings did not know him.

This can't be blamed on him, after all, he has improved too fast and his knowledge can't keep up.

Just like many ordinary four or five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, it is impossible to know the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor and the Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor.

However, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor knew him, because he introduced it to Ye Tian.

"The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor comes from another territorial sea - the Immortal Territorial Sea, the Immortal Territorial Sea is far inferior to the primeval territorial waters, but the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor was born in the Immortal Territorial Sea, which is famous for the entire territorial sea boundary crack. Like the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor, he established the Immortal Sword Mountain and cultivated several Nine-Time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, as well as an Ancient Eight-Time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, that is, the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor who came before, he is a disciple of the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor!" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor introduced.

This time, there were several primordial-level geniuses from the Eight Blood Transformation Realms, and the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor was one of them, coming behind the Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor.

Now.

Ye Xingchen was trembling, there were too many strong people who appeared, if it weren't for Ye Tian protecting him and blocking the breath of many strong people, otherwise Ye Xingchen wouldn't even be able to move.

Subsequently, several more primordial-level geniuses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm came.

The deputy mountain master of the top overlord-level force Taigu Mountain, the Mo Yu Heavenly Ancestor, this Mo Yu Heavenly Ancestor is also an ancient level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and his strength is weaker than that of the Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor.

The top overlord-level force, the Dark Sea, also came a nine-time Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level genius, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, whose strength was no less than that of Ao Heng.

It can be said that almost all of these Nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level geniuses who have arrived have survived from the primeval era or the ancient era in the territorial sea boundary to the present.

According to the major event nodes, the boundary gap of the territorial sea divides the time into the primeval era, the ancient era, the medieval era, the ancient era and the present era.

The time span of each era is very long, among which the Archean era spans too long to calculate, while the Ancient Era is 7 million Archean epochs, the Middle Ages is 600,000 Archean epochs, and the Early Antiquity is only 180,000 primeval epochs.

As for the present era, only 90,000 primeval epochs have passed.

Therefore, according to the time, the last time the ancient gold tablet was born was at the end of the ancient era.
